title: sanguisorba minor subsp. alveolosa
intro: Sanguisorba minor subsp. alveolosa, also known as salad burnet, is a perennial herb belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, making it useful for treating wounds, reducing bleeding, and soothing digestive issues. The health benefits of Sanguisorba minor subsp. alveolosa include its ability to aid in the healing of cuts and bruises, reduce menstrual bleeding, and support the health of the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Sanguisorba minor subsp. alveolosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
